$comment: Preset for sdlc-gate-evidence-collector. Drop the sub_agent into stages.<N>.sub_agents[] and add the memory key. The collector reads gate criteria from SDLC_VALIDATION.md and returns file:line citations.

sub_agent.description: Reads stage gate criteria and produces file:line citations for each.

gate_contribution.rationale: No gate may pass without at least one citation-bearing finding. Add this preset to every stage.
